objective: Run the approved read-only USB/UART/TCP Sandbox and persistent-file-access matrix on exact hardware without destructive device mutation.
deliverables: Externally approved lab authorization binding the exact read-only plan, operator, device binding, firmware, transport, HDC and validity window.
Controlled USB/UART/TCP evidence for both signed prototypes, including child access to selected image, HDC key location and output directory.
Owner-attested terminal run and verified hardware evidence record; destructive device dispatch count remains zero.

verification.method: End-to-end selected file/key/output and USB/UART/TCP matrix.
verification.expectedEvidence: Each Sandbox and non-Sandbox case records actual read/write/execute behavior for USB, UART and TCP under the exact approved lab plan and target.

stopConditions: The protected claim owner proof, external lab approval, physical target confirmation or exact plan/target binding is unavailable or mismatched.
The clean VM snapshot, signed prototype, selected HDC fixture or required USB/UART/TCP hardware is unavailable.
Any planned Step requires deviceMutation/destructive effect, host privilege elevation, driver/helper installation, quarantine mutation or private-key copying.
The authorization expires, device binding changes, or HDC/Provider/firmware differs before dispatch.
